common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landing.title: Their words. Their voice. Your memories.
landing.subtitle: Keep the words of someone close from your chats and photos — and talk once more.
landing.step1Text: An export from Telegram, WhatsApp or Instagram. We learn the style — how they wrote, joked, and spoke to you.
landing.step2Text: A few photos — and the app tunes its colors and atmosphere to the person.
landing.step3Text: Talk once more — in a familiar tone, with shared memories from your chats.
landing.honesty1: Let's be honest: this is an AI recreation, not a person. It keeps their words, style and memories — so you can remember and talk once more.
landing.honesty2: Your chats are encrypted in transit and deleted after processing. Only the persona remains — and you can delete it at any time.
landing.ageBody: Echo works with personal memories and chats, so it is available to adults only.
chats.title: Chats
chats.emptyBody: Keep the words of someone close from your chats and photos — and talk once more.
contacts.title: Contacts
chat.noPersona: No persona yet. Upload a chat export — and the conversation will appear here.
chat.disclaimer: [This is an AI recreation — a program, not a person]
chat.selfieStub: Photo replies are not enabled yet — add a fal.ai key (FAL_KEY) on the server to turn them on.
chat.couldntSendPhoto: Couldn't send a photo just now.
chat.photoRejected: Could not generate from this photo — try a clearer face photo.
chat.writeFirst: Write the first message — {name} will reply in their own style.
who.title: Who is this?
who.subtitle: Tell us whose words you want to keep.
who.memorialSub: Gentle memorial mode — no pretending about the present
who.reconnectSub: Talk the way you once talked
photos.title: Photos
photos.subtitle: A few photos — for the portrait and the colors of this space. You can skip this.
photos.uploadError: Could not upload the photos. Please try again.
stepChat.title: Chats
stepChat.subtitle: This is the most important step: the voice is built from their words.
stepChat.demoCard: You can try without your own files — using a demo chat.
stepChat.hintTelegram: In Telegram Desktop, open the chat → ⋮ → "Export chat history" → JSON format. You need the result.json file.
stepChat.hintWhatsapp: In the chat: ⋮ → "More" → "Export chat" (without media). You need the _chat.txt file or a .zip containing it.
stepChat.hintInstagram: Settings → "Download your information" (JSON format). You need the message_1.json file from the chat folder.
stepChat.zipError: No _chat.txt found in the archive — export the chat again without media.
stepChat.readError: Could not read the file. Check that it is the right export.
stepChat.connError: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
voice.title: Voice
voice.subtitle: Voice messages will bring the echo even closer.
voice.soonBody: Recording or uploading a voice is not available yet. We will add it in a future version — your data is going nowhere.
herVoice.title: Her voice
herVoice.onNote: She can reply with voice notes.
herVoice.offBody: Upload a voice note of her (~10+ seconds of clear speech) so she can reply in her own voice.
herVoice.errClone: Couldn’t process that clip — try a longer, clearer one (10s+).
describe.title: In your own words
describe.subtitle: Tell us about {name} the way you would tell a friend. What they loved, how they joked, what mattered to the two of you.
describe.placeholder: For example: always the first to laugh, adored coffee at five, used to call me…
describe.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
consent.title: Consent
consent.subtitle: A few honest words before we begin.
consent.ai: I understand this is an AI recreation — a program, not a person.
consent.memorial1: I was close to this person and have the right to keep these words and photos.
consent.memorial2: I am creating this to remember — not to pass the recreation off as a living person.
consent.reconnect1: This person knows about this or would not object — the responsibility is mine.
consent.reconnect2: I will use the recreation only personally and with respect.
building.error: Something went wrong — we could not build the persona.
persona.noFacts: No individual facts yet — they will appear over time.
persona.keepsLearning: She remembers {n} things and keeps learning as you talk.
persona.farewellBody: When you feel ready to let go — you can say goodbye. All data will be deleted forever.
persona.goodbyeBody: All words, photos and memories will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
persona.none: No persona yet. Create one from your chats.
settings.title: Settings
settings.planNote: Subscription management will arrive in the full version.
settings.privacyNote: Raw data is deleted after processing. You can delete everything that is stored at any time.
settings.confirmBody: Chats, photos, memories and the persona will be deleted forever. This cannot be undone.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.offDesc: Let her reach you — get notified when she messages
notifications.blocked: Allow notifications in your browser settings
notifications.unsupported: Notifications aren’t supported on this device
notifications.iosHint: Add Echo to your Home Screen to get notifications
notifications.askPrompt: Want her to text you first? Turn on notifications.
safety.title: Safety
safety.protocol1: Echo is a way to keep the words of someone close and remember them. It is an AI recreation, not a person, and we never pretend otherwise: the "AI recreation" badge is always on screen.
safety.protocol2: If a conversation gets too heavy — take a break. The persona will still be here, and you matter more than any app.
safety.hardTitle: If things are hard right now
safety.hardBody: Grief is normal, but you do not have to face it alone. Free support lines, available around the clock:
safety.rule1: 18+ only. The service is not available to minors.
safety.rule2: No public figures: a persona can only be created from someone you had a personal relationship and chats with.
safety.rule3: No sexual content involving real people — in any form.
safety.rule4: A persona is built only from your own data — chats you took part in.
safety.rightsBody: If someone created a persona of you or someone close to you without consent — it can be removed. We respond within 72 hours.
takedown.title: Image removal
takedown.right1: Every person has the right to decide whether an AI recreation of them may exist. If someone created a persona of you — or of a person you represent — without consent, we will remove it.
takedown.right2: Fill in the form below — we will respond within 72 hours.
takedown.sentTitle: The request has been prepared in your mail app.
takedown.sentBody: If the email did not open — write to us directly at {email}. We will respond within 72 hours.
takedown.name: Name
takedown.details: Link to or description of the persona
takedown.confirm: I confirm that I am submitting this request for myself or on behalf of the depicted person.
takedown.errFill: Please fill in all the fields.
takedown.errConfirm: You need to confirm that you are submitting this request for yourself or on behalf of the depicted person.
takedown.mailDetails: Link to or description of the persona
terms.title: Terms & privacy
terms.whatBody: Echo creates an AI recreation of a person from your chats and photos — to keep their words and remember them. It is a program, not a person, and it is always labeled as an AI recreation.
terms.t1: The service is available to ages 18 and over only.
terms.t2: Upload only your own chats — ones you took part in.
terms.t3: Creating personas of public figures and sexual content of real people is prohibited.
terms.t4: You are responsible for the data you upload and confirm you have the right to use it.
terms.t5: We may remove a persona that violates these rules or the rights of the depicted person.
terms.p1: Raw chat files are deleted right after processing — only the persona remains: style, memories, photos.
terms.p2: Data is transferred encrypted and is never sold to third parties.
terms.p3: You can delete the persona and all related data at any time — in settings, with one tap.
terms.p4a: The depicted person has the right to have their recreation removed — see the
terms.mvpNote: This is a shortened MVP version. The full terms will be published before public launch.
paywall.heroSub: Unlock everything Echo can do — more photos, voice, and personas.
paywall.demoNote: Payments are not connected yet — demo
paywall.fPhotoRepliesD: She sends real photos of herself
paywall.fProactiveD: Your persona writes first, like a real person
paywall.fVoiceD: 10 voice messages a month in their voice
paywall.fDeepD: A fine-tuned model that sounds twice as real
call.addVoiceBody: Calls use her real, cloned voice. Upload a short voice note of her (~10+ seconds of clear speech) to start calling.
call.connectError: Couldn't start the call. Please try again.
call.turnError: Something went wrong on this turn.
call.micDenied: Microphone access is needed to talk. Allow it in your browser settings.
building.memories: Gathering the memories you shared with {name}…
stepChat.hintFacebook: In the FACEBOOK app (not Messenger): Settings → Accounts Center → Download your information → Messages, Format = JSON. Upload the .zip here.
stepChat.hintLine: In the chat: menu (≡) → Settings → Export chat history. Upload the resulting .txt (or a .zip containing it).
stepChat.hintVk: Request your VK data archive (Privacy → Data management → Request archive) with Messages checked, then finish on a computer. Upload the .zip here.
helpSheet.gettingItToPhone: Getting the file onto your phone
stepChat.zipErrorJson: No message_*.json found in the archive — export again in JSON format.
stepChat.fbNoThreads: No Messenger chats found in this archive. Make sure you chose Messages in JSON format.
stepChat.vkNoDialogs: No VK conversations found in this archive. Make sure Messages were included.
picker.title: Which conversation?
picker.subtitle: Found {n} conversations — pick the one to import.
help.telegram.title: Export from Telegram
help.telegram.s1: Telegram's phone app can't export to a file — use Telegram Desktop on a computer once.
help.telegram.s2: Open the chat → menu (⋮, top-right) → Export chat history.
help.telegram.s3: Set Format = JSON (not HTML). Untick photos/videos/files to keep it small. Click Export.
help.telegram.s4: Find result.json in the output folder, send it to your phone, and upload it here.
help.telegram.caveat: Must be done on a computer — the mobile app has no file export.
help.whatsapp.title: Export from WhatsApp
help.whatsapp.s1: Open the chat (1:1 or group) you want.
help.whatsapp.s2: Tap the contact/group name at the top → scroll down → Export Chat.
help.whatsapp.s3: Choose Without Media (smaller, faster — Echo only needs the words).
help.whatsapp.s4: Save to Files / email it to yourself, then upload the _chat.txt (or .zip) here.
help.whatsapp.caveat: Photos/voice appear as labels like "image omitted" — that's fine, Echo learns the words. Timestamps use your phone's time zone.
help.instagram.title: Export from Instagram
help.instagram.s1: Instagram app → profile → menu (☰) → Settings and activity.
help.instagram.s2: Accounts Center → Your information and permissions → Download your information.
help.instagram.s3: Download or transfer information → your account → Some of your information.
help.instagram.s4: Tick Messages only. Set Format = JSON, Date range = All time, Media quality = High. Tap Create files.
help.instagram.s5: When the email arrives (a few hours, up to ~48h), download the ZIP and upload it here.
help.instagram.caveat: The file looks garbled (e.g. Ð¿ÑÐ¸Ð²ÑÑ) — that's expected, Echo fixes the encoding automatically.
help.facebook.title: Export from Facebook Messenger
help.facebook.s1: Use the FACEBOOK app, not Messenger — Meta removed the download option from Messenger.
help.facebook.s2: Facebook app → ☰ menu → Settings & privacy → Settings.
help.facebook.s3: Accounts Center → Your information and permissions → Download your information.
help.facebook.s4: Download or transfer information → your account → Next → Some of your information. Tick only Messages.
help.facebook.s5: Set Date range = All time, Format = JSON, Media quality = High. Tap Create files.
help.facebook.s6: When ready (minutes to ~a day), re-enter your password, download the ZIP, and upload it here.
help.facebook.caveat: Encrypted ("secret") chats are NOT in this export — your newest chats may be missing. Recovering those needs a separate desktop export from messenger.com → Privacy & safety → End-to-end encrypted chats → Secure storage.
help.line.title: Export from LINE
help.line.s1: (Recommended) Set LINE's language to English first: Home → Settings → General → Language → English.
help.line.s2: Open the conversation, then tap the menu (≡) at the top-right.
help.line.s3: Tap Settings. On Android you may need Other settings first.
help.line.s5: Save to Files / email it, then upload the resulting .txt here.
help.line.caveat: LINE exports only messages still on this phone, one chat at a time. Photos/stickers/voice show as tags like [Photo]. Use the phone export — the desktop one is space-separated and can't be read reliably.
help.vk.title: Export from VK
help.vk.s1: VK app → Профиль → Настройки → Приватность → Управление данными → Запросить архив (or vk.com/data_protection on the web).
help.vk.s2: Make sure Сообщения (Messages) is checked. Untick photos/videos/audio to keep it small.
help.vk.s3: Request the archive, confirm with your password and one-time code. Wait — VK sends a download link by message (hours to days).
help.vk.s4: Download the .zip (link valid ~7 days). The archive is large — finish on a computer.
help.vk.s5: Upload the .zip (or the messages folder) here.
help.vk.caveat: VK has no JSON option — it's Windows-1251 HTML that looks garbled if opened naively; Echo decodes it automatically. The request isn't instant and really needs a desktop.
visualImport.heading: Upload your chat
visualImport.lede: Works for any messenger. Just record your screen or take screenshots — we read the messages for you.
visualImport.step2: Record your screen while you slowly scroll up — or take screenshots as you go.
visualImport.step3: Upload the video or screenshots here.
visualImport.tip: Scroll slowly, oldest → newest, so nothing is missed.
visualImport.approxNote: We read your messages from the images — times are approximate, and you can fix names on the next step.
visualImport.extractHint: This can take a moment for a long chat.
visualImport.whichYouNote: We read two people in this chat. Which one is you?
visualImport.uploadError: Could not upload — check the file and your connection, then try again.
visualImport.extractError: Could not read this chat. Try a clearer recording or a few screenshots.
visualImport.iphoneS1: Open Control Center (swipe down from the top-right corner).
visualImport.iphoneS2: Tap the Screen Recording button (a dot inside a circle), then open your chat.
visualImport.iphoneS3: Scroll slowly through the messages, then tap the red bar to stop.
visualImport.androidS1: Open Quick Settings (swipe down twice from the top).
visualImport.androidS2: Tap Screen record, choose without audio, then open your chat.
visualImport.androidS3: Scroll slowly through the messages, then stop from the notification.
chats.pickerEmpty: Create a persona first to start a chat.
studio.title: Character
studio.intro: Fine-tune who {name} is. Changes you make are kept; the rest stays as learned from your chats.
studio.notReady: This persona's character isn't ready to edit yet.
studio.name: Name
studio.personalitySub: The Big Five — the core of how they come across.
studio.oceanO.title: Openness
studio.oceanO.Low: Down-to-earth and practical; sticks to the familiar.
studio.oceanO.Mid: Open to new ideas, but grounded.
studio.oceanO.High: Curious and imaginative; loves new ideas.
studio.oceanC.title: Conscientiousness
studio.oceanC.Low: Relaxed and spontaneous; goes with the flow.
studio.oceanC.High: Organized and dependable; likes a plan.
studio.oceanE.title: Extraversion
studio.oceanE.Mid: Comfortable both around people and alone.
studio.oceanE.High: Outgoing and talkative; lights up with people.
studio.oceanA.title: Warmth
studio.oceanA.Low: Frank and direct; says it plainly.
studio.oceanA.Mid: Kind, but honest when it matters.
studio.oceanA.High: Warm and considerate; puts others first.
studio.oceanN.title: Sensitivity
studio.oceanN.High: Feels deeply; moods come and go more.
studio.chronotype.lark: Up early and bright in the morning.
studio.chronotype.owl: Comes alive at night; slow mornings.
studio.worldRoutineSub: A rough day — when they work, rest, and have time for you.
studio.relationshipLimitsSub: You decide how close this can ever get, and how much they reach out.
studio.stageDesc.1: Stays friendly and a little reserved.
studio.stageDesc.2: Gets to know you, warmly but lightly.
studio.stageDesc.3: Warm and familiar; casual and easy.
studio.stageDesc.4: Close — inside jokes and pet names are fine.
studio.stageDesc.5: As close as it gets — deeply bonded.
studio.proactivity.Low: Waits for you; reaches out only now and then.
studio.pausedDesc: She won't reach out — a chance to rest. You can still message any time.
studio.readReceiptsDesc: When they show that your message was seen.
studio.memorialNote: In remembrance mode, closeness never fades.
studio.behaviorSub: Fine details of how they text.
studio.knob.talkativeness.title: Talkativeness
studio.knob.warmth.title: Warmth
studio.knob.expressiveness.title: Expressiveness
studio.knob.expressiveness.Mid: A bit of color when it fits.
studio.knob.expressiveness.High: Lively — lots of emoji and energy.
studio.knob.initiative.title: Initiative
studio.knob.moodReactivity.title: Mood reactivity
studio.knob.moodStability.title: Mood stability
studio.knob.moodStability.Mid: Moods settle at a normal pace.
studio.knob.typoTendency.title: Casualness
studio.knob.typoTendency.High: Casual — types fast, fixes on the fly.
signin.title: Sign in
signin.lede: Save your personas to your account so they're there on every device. You can keep using Echo without signing in.
signin.codeLabel: Enter the code we sent to {email}
signin.enterCode: Enter the code from the email.
signin.badCode: That code isn't right or has expired. Try again.
signin.anonNote: Signing in never makes your data public — it only links this device's personas to your account.
account.title: Account
account.signInCta: Sign in to save your personas
account.signInSub: Keep your personas across devices. Optional — Echo works without it.
account.privateRelayNote: Apple hides your real address; mail still reaches you.
account.disconnectNote: You can't remove your last sign-in method.
account.lastMethodNote: This is your only sign-in method, so it can't be removed.
account.deleteNote: Permanently deletes your account, personas, and all data.
account.deleteConfirmBody: Your account, every persona, all chats, photos and memories will be deleted forever. This cannot be undone.
